name: runtime_txn
description: Per-transaction runtime event — execution result, compute usage, fees, cost-tracker data, per-node timing, and the list of accounts that were actually modified by the transaction.

signature.description: First signature of the transaction (64 bytes)

slot.description: Slot the txn was executed in

txn_idx.description: Position counter (matches events.account.txn_idx — monotonic since process start, not reset per slot)

blockhash.description: Recent blockhash this txn was signed with (32 bytes)

is_simple_vote.description: 1 if this is a simple vote txn, 0 otherwise

is_bundle.description: 1 if this txn was part of a bundle, 0 otherwise

bundle_id.description: Bundle id (0 if not part of a bundle)

is_committable.description: 1 if the txn result was persisted to the accountsdb, 0 if cancelled

is_fees_only.description: 1 if only fees were charged; execution itself failed

txn_err.description: Top-level txn error code (FD_RUNTIME_TXN_ERR_*; 0 = success). Negated to positive at emission, so e.g. FD_RUNTIME_TXN_ERR_INSTRUCTION_ERROR is stored as 9.

exec_err.description: Instruction-level error when txn_err indicates an instruction error. Stored as the absolute value of the internal negative code.

exec_err_kind.description: Sub-kind of exec_err. Stored as the absolute value of the internal negative code.

exec_err_idx.description: Index of the failing instruction within the txn.

custom_err.description: Custom error code from the failing instruction (when exec_err indicates a custom error)

compute_unit_limit.description: Compute unit limit set for this txn

compute_units_consumed.description: Compute units actually consumed (= limit - remaining meter at end of execution)

heap_size.description: Heap size requested for VMs for this txn

accounts_resize_delta.description: Net accounts data size delta for this txn (signed; stored as bit-pattern u64)

num_builtin_instrs.description: Number of built-in instructions in the txn

num_non_builtin_instrs.description: Number of non-built-in (BPF) instructions in the txn

execution_fee.description: Execution fee paid by the fee payer (lamports)

priority_fee.description: Priority fee paid by the fee payer (lamports)

signature_count.description: Number of signatures in the txn

prep_start.description: Wall-clock time when txn preparation started (nanosecond precision)

load_start.description: Wall-clock time when account loading started (nanosecond precision)

exec_start.description: Wall-clock time when execution started (nanosecond precision)

commit_start.description: Wall-clock time when commit started (nanosecond precision)

account_diffs.description: Accounts that were actually modified by this transaction (post-state). Read-only-touched accounts are NOT included.

owner.description: Owner program after the txn (32 bytes)

data_sz.description: Account data size in bytes after the txn

executable.description: 1 if account is executable after the txn, 0 otherwise

stake_update.description: 1 if this update triggered a stake-cache update

vote_update.description: 1 if this update triggered a vote-cache update

new_vote.description: 1 if this update created a new vote account

rm_vote.description: 1 if this update removed/closed a vote account

dispatch_fec_mr.description: FEC merkle root that was the bank's latest_mr at the moment this txn was dispatched (32 bytes).  NOT the canonical block_id — an intermediate FEC mr in the bank's chain.  Join to runtime_block.fec_merkle_roots[].mr to recover the canonical block_id.

writable_accounts.description: All accounts the txn locked as writable, in account-order.  account_diffs is a subset (writable AND actually modified).

readonly_accounts.description: All accounts the txn locked as read-only, in account-order.
